privileged_info_summary: The task extracts vertices from South American countries using the public Natural Earth 'ne_110m_admin_0_countries' dataset. Filtering for CONTINENT == 'South America' accurately yields 13 features with an exact bounding box of X: -81.411 to -34.730, and Y: -55.612 to 12.437. The output shapefile is saved to '/home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/sa_vertices.shp' and MUST contain point geometries (ESRI shape types 1, 8, 11, 21, or 28). The arbitrary bounding box bounds specified in the metadata do not strictly match the actual shapefile bounding box of South American borders.
